steps.title: Identify the structure on each side
steps.content: Left: "The impact of Simpson's work is ______" — an independent clause with predicate adjective slot. Right: "expanding the horizons of conceptual photographic art, challenging conventional notions..., and shedding light..." — a participial phrase listing three actions that elaborate what "threefold" means.

steps.title: Apply the rule: a colon introduces elaboration after an independent clause
steps.content:
The word threefold promises an explanation of three dimensions; the participial phrase delivers it. A colon signals that elaboration.
  • Choice A — threefold; expanding: "...is threefold; expanding the horizons..." — a semicolon joins two independent clauses, but "expanding the horizons..." is a participial phrase, not an IC. ✗
  • Choice B — threefold expanding: "...is threefold expanding the horizons..." — no punctuation runs the adjective into the participial phrase with no signal, creating an awkward construction. ✗
  • Choice C — threefold. expanding: "...is threefold. Expanding the horizons..." — the period creates a sentence fragment ("Expanding..." lacks a finite verb and subject). ✗
  • Choice D — threefold: expanding: "...is threefold: expanding the horizons..., challenging..., and shedding light..." — the colon correctly follows the IC and introduces the elaborating trio. ✓
That matches Choice D — threefold: expanding.
